title: Norwegian Salmon Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy Norwegian dish featuring char-grilled salmon, Thai green curry paste, and a low-fat friendly profile, perfect for a brunch mood. The combination of cultured and molten flavors creates a mouth-watering experience.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 10 minutes to prevent burning.
Thread the salmon pieces onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Mix the Thai green curry paste, coconut milk, fish sauce, brown sugar, and lemon juice in a bowl to create the marinade.
Brush the marinade onto the salmon pieces, making sure they are fully coated.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
